intro: MEDICATIONS and pharmacological agents used in dental care.
reading: Dental pharmacology in routine visits often involves sedation and pain management, such as nitrous oxide (laughing gas), along with anesthetics and antibiotics prescribed for infections.

terms.example_en: Laughing gas helps patients relax during the procedure.
terms.example_ru: Веселящий газ помогает пациентам расслабиться во время процедуры.
